arts.ttl: Atalanta vs. Bologna, a big six-pointer
arts.sum: Atalanta have lost both of their last two matches against Bologna in the second half of the Serie A season, after a run of eight consecutive wins (and six clean sheets in the process); only once have the Bergamo team suffered more defeats in a row in the second half of the championship against the Rossoblù (seven between 1951 and 1957). Bologna are unbeaten in their last four league games (W3 D1) against Atalanta, after losing 13 of their previous 17 matches (W2 D2); the Emilians could avoid defeat in five matches in a row against the Bergamo side for only the second time, doing so between February 1953 and May 1955 (W4 D1).

arts.ttl: Weston McKennie among 13 footballers probed for illegal gambling in Italy
arts.sum: Weston McKennie and 12 others are under investigation for illegal betting in Italy. The probe follows revelations from Sandro Tonali and Nicolò Fagioli, who faced bans for gambling. No evidence links others to match bets, but fines may follow for online poker use.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Set Sights on In-Demand Bologna Defender
arts.sum: Sought-after Bologna defender Jhon Lucumi has emerged as a concrete target for Barcelona ahead of the summer transfer window. According to Spanish outlet Diario AS, runaway La Liga leaders have earmarked the Colombian star as a summer objective. The post Barcelona Set Sights on In-Demand Bologna Defender appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
